signatures.label: theme(path, defaultValue?)
signatures.documentation: Access Tailwind theme configuration values in CSS. Uses dot notation for nested values. Returns the resolved value from your tailwind.config.js theme section.

parameters.label: path
parameters.documentation: Dot-notation path to the theme value. E.g. 'colors.blue.500', 'spacing.4', 'fontSize.lg', 'screens.md'.

parameters.label: defaultValue
parameters.documentation: Optional fallback value if the theme path doesn't resolve. E.g. theme('colors.brand', '#3b82f6').

signatures.label: screen(breakpoint)
signatures.documentation: Generate a media query referencing a Tailwind responsive breakpoint by name. Compiles to the corresponding min-width media query.

parameters.label: breakpoint
parameters.documentation: Named breakpoint from the theme. Default: 'sm' (640px), 'md' (768px), 'lg' (1024px), 'xl' (1280px), '2xl' (1536px).

signatures.label: calc(expression)
signatures.documentation: CSS calc() function for mathematical expressions. Can be combined with theme() values.

parameters.label: expression
parameters.documentation: Math expression using +, -, *, /. E.g. calc(100% - theme('spacing.4')).

signatures.label: var(--custom-property, fallback?)
signatures.documentation: Access CSS custom properties. Often used with Tailwind's internal custom properties or user-defined ones.

parameters.label: --custom-property
parameters.documentation: CSS custom property name. E.g. --tw-ring-color, --tw-shadow, or custom properties.

parameters.label: fallback
parameters.documentation: Optional fallback value if the custom property is not defined.

signatures.label: plugin(function({ addUtilities, addComponents, addBase, matchUtilities, theme }))
signatures.documentation: Tailwind CSS plugin function for extending the framework with custom utilities, components, and base styles.

parameters.label: pluginFunction
parameters.documentation: Function receiving helper methods: addUtilities(), addComponents(), addBase(), matchUtilities(), theme(), e(), config(), variants().
